entry.title: Bitcoin covenants are inevitable
entry.summary: Bitcoin's principal appeal for investors lies in its finite supply, which fundamentally sets it apart as an asset. This inherent characteristic positions Bitcoin predominantly as a store of value rather than a functional currency. Despite some perceived disadvantages due to this limitation, the overall investment thesis supporting Bitcoin's value proposition remains largely unchallenged. The consensus is that questioning this foundational aspect may not yield substantial benefits at this stage, indicating a general acceptance of Bitcoin's role underpinned by its supply constraints. This perspective highlights the cryptocurrency's unique place in the financial ecosystem, primarily driven by its scarcity.
